claim_under_attack: All six critical unknowns (user demand, deal loss attribution, competitive feature specifics, workflow context, scope definition, opportunity cost) can be resolved in 2–3 weeks with a single PM and no engineering resources.
evidence_or_reason: The artifact provides no evidence for the execution estimate or staffing assumption. Several listed tasks depend on cross-functional availability and uncertain throughput: CRM/support audits can require ops help, AE interviews depend on sales scheduling, 5–8 user interviews may take longer than 1–2 weeks to recruit and complete, and scope definition may require engineering input to test feasibility. Claiming the full unknown set can be resolved in 2–3 weeks with one PM and no engineering overstates certainty without visible support.
